metadata.title: youin | Product backlog pinned to your UI
metadata.description: Create tasks on the exact UI element that needs work, with selector, screenshot, viewport, browser context, and discussion attached.

notFound.asideNote: * Request matched no live route or document. Assets and deep links drift when URLs change between releases — return to dashboard or homepage to continue.
notFound.title: This route has no landing yet.
notFound.body: The URL might be mistyped, the page may have moved, or the link could be stale. Pick up from a known workspace surface and keep reviewing where your team actually ships work.
notFound.footer: youin — feedback on the live web

authShell.headline: Create the account. Start marking the product.
authShell.lead: YouIn keeps UI work attached to the live interface, then turns that context into tasks your team can actually resolve.
authShell.bullet1: Built for agencies and product teams working on live pages.
authShell.bullet2: Pins, selectors, screenshots, and discussion stay together.
authShell.bullet3: Invite reviewers after the workspace opens.

routeError.title: We couldn't finish loading this page.
routeError.body: The error has been logged. Try again — most failures here are transient (network blips, a slow query). If it keeps happening, head back to the dashboard and reopen the page.

bootstrap.title: Failed to load workspace
bootstrap.bodyFallback: Please try again or reload the page.

actions.triageSub: Unassigned open marks grouped by page

hero.title: Your product backlog, pinned to your actual UI.
hero.subtitle: Click the live interface, create the task, and keep the selector, screenshot, browser context, and discussion attached.

problem.title: The work is spatial. The tools are flat.
problem.p1: Review starts on the page, then gets flattened into screenshots, Slack archaeology, and tickets that say which button? YouIn keeps the work attached to the interface moment that created it.
problem.oldLoopBody: Screenshot, annotate, paste in chat, explain the page, answer follow-up questions, repeat after the next deploy.
problem.withBody: Point once at the live UI. The task keeps its selector, capture, discussion, and status together.

loop.title: A backlog that remembers where the work is.

steps.title: Pin work to the live element
steps.body: Click the exact button, card, modal, table row, or empty state. YouIn captures the URL, selector, viewport, and screenshot automatically.

steps.title: Keep context after the page changes
steps.body: Tasks stay tied to the interface with selector, viewport, and screenshot fallbacks, so deployment drift does not turn review notes into guesswork.

steps.title: Move it through the backlog
steps.body: Triage, assign, discuss, and resolve the mark with visual context and workflow status in one place. No screenshot translation needed.

install.title: Stop describing the thing you can point at.
install.subtitle: The beta is free while the core workflow is shaped with early teams. The next time someone spots UI work, turn that exact element into the task.
